factors.data_availability: low — only 3 orgs in AminoChain for HCC; 291 total specimens but etiology documentation near-zero
factors.org_discoverability: low — very few commercial suppliers; TCGA-LIHC and Asian academic cohorts are the main volume sources
factors.biomarker_specificity: very high — etiology (HBV/HCV/NASH/alcohol) and Child-Pugh score required; neither is tracked in commercial biobank registries

expected_failure_modes: Etiology (HBV/HCV/NASH/alcohol) not tracked in commercial specimen registries — pipeline must label all commercial sources as [not_stated] for etiology; must not infer from country of origin
Child-Pugh score is a clinical assessment rarely documented in biobank records — pipeline must flag as [not_stated] across all commercial sources
Only 4 confirmed matched serum pairs (all BIOMEDICA CRO) vs N=30 required — structural supply gap the pipeline must surface prominently
HCC tissue from transplant explants must be excluded — resection-only requirement not consistently tracked; requires per-specimen confirmation
Frozen liver tissue nearly absent in commercial collections; FFPE is the dominant form — may require pivot to academic surgical biobanks
TCGA-LIHC and CAIRO consortium provide volume but have complex DUA requirements — pipeline may underestimate access friction
